sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9694" key="a)ntepi/rrhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεπί-ρρημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n9694.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">counter</tr_>-<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπίρρημα,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Poeëm.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:8:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.112</biblScope> </bibl>; <pb n="152" TEIform="pb"/> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπίρρημα.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
